children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

data_operations.description: Insert new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients; check doctor availability at requested time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify patient_id exists
Read to check availability, write to create appointment

data_operations.description: Verify patient_id exists in patients database
Check doctor availability and create appointment record

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
appointment_time must be in the future
doctor must be available at requested time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments database with unique appointment_id

children.name: RetrieveRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

global_vars.description: Read medical records for the given patient_id

data_operations.description: Query records database for patient_id and sort by timestamp descending

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of records sorted by date descending

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields; if insurance changed, validate against external system
children.behavior: Update patient record in patients database with provided fields; if insurance field is present and different from current, validate via external system before saving; return success

global_vars.description: Read current patient record, write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read current record, update fields, write back

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
If insurance field is present and changed, must validate via external system before saving

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is updated in patients database with new fields

governance_notes: All children inherit parent's global_vars as a superset. Each child only declares the subset of global_vars it actually accesses. RegisterPatient and BookAppointment are atomic_operations due to side effects. RetrieveRecords is pure_function (read-only). UpdatePatientProfile is atomic_operation due to write and external validation.
